summary: Excellent matrix remix of a fiery Fall ’83 second set featuring scorching Help > Slip and a wild Wang Dang Doodle.
review: The show is hailed as the epitome of the 1983 tour, with a blistering second‑set that includes a smoking Help > Slip sequence and an unforgettable, if mic‑troubled, Wang Dang Doodle. Reviewers rave about Dave Usborne’s remix/mastering, calling the audio crisp, upgraded and one of the best you’ll hear from this era.

ai_rating.rationale: Multiple reviewers give 4‑5 stars and praise both the performance (especially the second set) and the high‑quality remix, outweighing a few neutral or nonsensical comments.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Remixed and mastered by Dave Usborne; reviewers describe the sound as crisp, upgraded and among the best available for this era, with only minor mic‑issue artifacts on Wang Dang Doodle.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set is described as the epitome of ’83—fiery and high‑energy—but some feel it doesn’t fully elevate toward the very end.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as going "ape" and delivering shredding, wild guitar work in the second set.
band_member_comments.Bob: Noted mic issues during Wang Dang Doodle, affecting his vocals.
